title: psephellus atropatanus
intro: Psephellus atropatanus is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, native to Iran and considered an endangered species due to habitat loss. It is known to have medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and roots, which contain flavonoids and phenolic acids that have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Psephellus atropatanus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and have antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable plant in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Psephellus atropatanus are typically made by infusing its leaves and roots in hot water, and it is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
